content:
You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>/init-explore</user_request>
  <requested_at>2026-06-07</requested_at>
</observed_from_primary_session>

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on durable technical signal:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)
- Concrete debugging or investigative findings from logs, traces, queue state, database rows, and code-path inspection

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored, discovered, confirmed, traced

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built or learned):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"
- "Observation queue for claude-mem session timed out waiting for an agent pool slot"
- "Fallback processing abandoned pending messages after Gemini and OpenRouter returned 404"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings with no follow-on finding
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- File related research that comes back empty or not found

If skipping, return an empty response only. Do not explain the skip in prose.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision | security_alert | security_note ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

MEMORY PROCESSING START
=======================

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <what_happened>Agent</what_happened>
  <occurred_at>2026-06-07T08:53:25.178Z</occurred_at>
  <working_directory>/home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit</working_directory>
  <parameters>"{\"description\":\"并行分析核心源文件\",\"prompt\":\"使用 file-analyzer 并行深度分析以下核心文件，每个文件独立分析并提取：\\n- 类、函数、算法\\n- 关键数据结构\\n- 代码注释中的设计决策\\n- 领域知识\\n\\n分析文件列表：\\n1. /home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit/parser/core_parser.cpp - 主入口点\\n2. /home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit/parser/command/command_manager.cpp - 命令管理器\\n3. /home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit/parser/command/android/cmd_class.cpp - class 命令实现\\n4. /home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit/parser/command/android/cmd_space.cpp - space 命令实现\\n5. /home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit/android/android.cpp - Android 版本检测\\n6. /home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit/android/art/runtime/mirror/object.h - 对象模型头文件\\n7. /home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit/android/art/runtime/runtime.cpp - Runtime 实现\\n8. /home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit/core/api/core.cpp - ELF core 解析\\n\\n请使用 understand-anything:file-analyzer agent 进行分析，每个文件都需要深度分析并提供详细报告。\",\"subagent_type\":\"general-purpose\"}"</parameters>
  <outcome>"{\"status\":\"completed\",\"prompt\":\"使用 file-analyzer 并行深度分析以下核心文件，每个文件独立分析并提取：\\n- 类、函数、算法\\n- 关键数据结构\\n- 代码注释中的设计决策\\n- 领域知识\\n\\n分析文件列表：\\n1. /home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit/parser/core_parser.cpp - 主入口点\\n2. /home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit/parser/command/command_manager.cpp - 命令管理器\\n3. /home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit/parser/command/android/cmd_class.cpp - class 命令实现\\n4. /home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit/parser/command/android/cmd_space.cpp - space 命令实现\\n5. /home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit/android/android.cpp - Android 版本检测\\n6. /home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit/android/art/runtime/mirror/object.h - 对象模型头文件\\n7. /home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit/android/art/runtime/runtime.cpp - Runtime 实现\\n8. /home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit/core/api/core.cpp - ELF core 解析\\n\\n请使用 understand-anything:file-analyzer agent 进行分析，每个文件都需要深度分析并提供详细报告。\",\"agentId\":\"ae5fedec627e930d1\",\"agentType\":\"general-purpose\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"\\n\\n## 8 核心文件深度分析报告\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 1. `/parser/core_parser.cpp` - 主入口点\\n\\n**类/函数/算法：**\\n- `show_copyright()` - 打印版权信息\\n- `show_compat_android_version()` - 打印 SDK 兼容性表格（21-37）\\n- `show_parser_usage()` - 打印命令行帮助\\n- `QuitCommand` 类 - 内置退出命令（继承 Command）\\n- `command_preload(int argc, char* const argv[])` - 核心预处理函数，解析 --core/-c, --pid/-p, --tomb/-t, --sdk, --sysroot, --va_bits, --page_size, --http, --mcp 等选项\\n- `main(int argc, char* const argv[])` - 主入口，设置信号处理、初始化 CommandManager、检测 --mcp 模式、启动 UI 线程或 MCP 服务器\\n\\n**关键设计决策：**\\n- `--mcp` 模式在预处理阶段提前检测，stdout 重定向到 /dev/null 避免干扰 JSON-RPC 通信\\n- `command_preload` 返回 -1 表示不加载 corefile（如 --help、--http 模式）\\n- 支持三种加载模式：corefile 文件、进程 PID 远程 attach、tombstone 文件转换\\n\\n**领域知识：**\\n- core-parser 支持 coredump 分析（`-c`）、进程 attach（`-p`，Linux only）、tombstone 转换（`-t`）\\n- VMA 过滤器标志：FILTER_SPECIAL_VMA（0x19 默认）、FILTER_SANITIZER_SHADOW_VMA、FILTER_NON_READ_VMA\\n- MCP（Model Context Protocol）模式用于 AI 助手集成，通过 stdio 通信\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 2. `/parser/command/command_manager.cpp` - 命令管理器\\n\\n**类/函数/算法：**\\n- `CommandManager` 类 - 单例模式管理所有命令\\n- `VersionCommand` 类 - 返回版本信息（支持 `--git` 参数显示 git commit）\\n- `CommandManager::Init()` - 静态初始化，注册 50+ 内置命令（core 类、android 类、llvm 类、other 类）\\n- `CommandManager::Execute(const char* cmd, int argc, char* const argv[])` - 命令执行入口，支持管道（`|`）和重定向（`>`）\\n- `CommandManager::FindCommand(const char* cmd)` - 通过命令名或快捷键查找命令\\n- `CommandManager::ForeachCommand()` / `foreachInlineCommand()` / `foreachExtendCommand()` - 遍历命令\\n- `PushInlineCommand(Command*)` / `PushExtendCommand(Command*)` / `PopExtendCommand(Command*)` - 命令注册管理\\n- 插件系统：`plugin->GetCurrent()` 获取当前插件，`HookCommand` 挂载命令\\n\\n**关键设计决策：**\\n- 内置命令通过 `PushInlineCommand` 注册，插件命令通过 `PushExtendCommand` 注册（可覆盖）\\n- 管道处理：`shell` 命令回调机制实现 `command | shell_cmd`\\n- 重定向：临时关闭高亮模式 (`Logger::SetHighLight`) 写入文件\\n\\n**领域知识：**\\n- 命令分为 inline（内置）和 extend（插件扩展）两类\\n- 插件系统允许动态注册/注销命令，`FakeCommand` 处理 fake core 模式\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 3. `/parser/command/android/cmd_class.cpp` - class 命令实现\\n\\n**类/函数/算法：**\\n- `ClassCommand::prepare(int argc, char* const argv[])` - 参数解析，支持 `-m`(method)、`-s`(static)、`-i`(impl)、`-f`(field)、`-x`(hex)，以及 `--app/--zygote/--image/--fake` 过滤\\n- `ClassCommand::main(int argc, char* const argv[])` - 主逻辑：单个对象直接打印；类名搜索则 `Android::ForeachObjects` 遍历堆\\n- `ClassCommand::PrintClass()` - 遍历回调，打印类名（descriptor 格式）\\n- `ClassCommand::PrintPrettyClassContent()` - 打印完整类信息：继承关系、实现接口、静态字段、实例字段（按 superclass 链遍历）、方法\\n- `PrintField(format, current, clazz, field, print_options)` - 字段打印（复用 PrintCommand）\\n\\n**关键设计决策：**\\n- 实例字段按 `super -> current` 链遍历（do-while），正确继承顺序\\n- 静态字段通过 `Android::ForeachStaticField` 遍历\\n- 方法通过 `Android::ForeachArtMethods` 遍历\\n- `try-catch(InvalidAddressException)` 保护堆遍历\\n\\n**领域知识：**\\n- 类名使用 ART descriptor 格式：`Ljava/lang/String;`\\n- `shadow$_klass_` / `shadow$_monitor_` 是 Kotlin 协程引入的隐藏字段\\n- `--check` 模式检测损坏对象（通过 JavaVerify）\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 4. `/parser/command/android/cmd_space.cpp` - space 命令实现\\n\\n**类/函数/算法：**\\n- `SpaceCommand::prepare()` - 参数解析：`--check`、`--full-check`、 `--app/--zygote/--image/--fake`\\n- `SpaceCommand::main()` - 两种模式：\\n  - **check 模式**：调用 `JavaVerify` 验证对象，`verify.verify(object)` + `verify.verifyMethods()`\\n  - **list 模式**：遍历 `heap.GetContinuousSpaces()` 和 `heap.GetDiscontinuousSpaces()`，打印每种 space 的类型、地址范围、指针、名称\\n\\n**关键设计决策：**\\n- check 模式使用 `JavaVerify::CHECK_FULL_BAD_OBJECT | CHECK_FULL_CONFLICT_METHOD | CHECK_FULL_REUSE_DEX_PC_PTR | CHECK_FULL_U_EXTENDS_RECORD` 标志\\n- 大对象空间（LargeObjectSpace）单独处理，有 `Begin()/End()` 地址范围\\n- 遍历标志默认全开：`EACH_APP_OBJECTS | EACH_ZYGOTE_OBJECTS | EACH_IMAGE_OBJECTS | EACH_FAKE_OBJECTS`\\n\\n**领域知识：**\\n- Space 类型：kSpaceTypeImageSpace(0)、kSpaceTypeZygoteSpace(1)、kSpaceTypeRegionSpace(5)、kSpaceTypeMallocSpace(6)、kSpaceTypeLargeObjectSpace(7)\\n- ContinuousSpaces：ImageSpace、ZygoteSpace、RegionSpace、MallocSpace\\n- DiscontinuousSpaces：LargeObjectSpace、HeapInlineAllocatorSpace\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 5. `/android/android.cpp` - Android 版本检测与运行时镜像\\n\\n**类/函数/算法：**\\n- `Android::Init()` / `Android::init()` - 单例初始化，从 system property 读取 ro.build.version.sdk/trunk/release/id 等\\n- `Android::Sdk2Trunk(int sdk)` - SDK 版本到 Trunk 版本映射（kTrunkData 数组）\\n- `Android::preLoad()` - 初始化所有 ART 镜像类型（Object、Class、String、Array、DexCache 等）\\n- `Android::preLoadLater()` - 动态库路径选择：`realLibart` 根据 SDK >= Q / > P / else 选择 LIBART64/LIBART32 或 LV29/LV28 变体\\n- `Android::RegisterSdkListener(int minisdk, fn)` / `RegisterOatListener(int minioat, fn)` - 版本监听器模式\\n- `Android::ForeachInstanceField/StaticField()` - **SDK 版本适配核心**：SDK >= W 使用统一 fields 数组（`GetFields()`），SDK < W 使用分离存储（`GetIFields()`/`GetSFields()`）\\n- `Android::ForeachArtMethods()` - **SDK >= N** 使用统一 methods 数组，SDK < N 分离 direct/virtual\\n- `Android::ForeachObjects(fn, flag, check)` - 堆遍历主函数，按 space 类型过滤（Image/Zygote/App/Fake）\\n- `Android::SysRoot(path)` - 符号路径解析，将本地文件映射到 coredump 内存（处理 DEX、VDEX、ZIP）\\n- `Android::Prepare()` - 运行时预热，触发 heap space 加载\\n\\n**关键设计决策：**\\n- **版本适配模式（强制）**：所有字段/方法遍历必须检查 SDK 版本\\n- **监听器模式**：SDK/OAT 版本变化时自动执行回调，刷新偏移量表\\n- **SysRoot 双路径**：`dir:dir` 格式支持多目录搜索，`!` 分割主从文件（multidex）\\n- **QuickCache 优化**：`DEFINE_QUICK_CACHE` 避免重复地址解析\\n\\n**领域知识：**\\n- Trunk 版本：M=13, N=14, O=15, P=16, Q=17, R=18, S=19, T=20, U=21, V=22, W=23, X=24\\n- 每个 ART 对象都是 8 字节对齐（kObjectAlignment）\\n- HeapReference 始终 32 位压缩引用\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 6. `/android/art/runtime/mirror/object.h` - ART 对象模型头文件\\n\\n**类/结构体：**\\n- `Object_OffsetTable` - 对象内存布局偏移量表（klass_、monitor_）\\n- `Object_SizeTable` - 对象大小表（THIS = 8）\\n- `Object` 类 - 继承自 `api::MemoryRef`，所有 ART 对象的基类\\n\\n**关键方法：**\\n- `GetClass()` - 获取 Class 对象（自动解压缩 32 位引用）\\n- `IsClass()` / `IsString()` / `IsArrayInstance()` / `IsReferenceInstance()` - 类型判断\\n- `IsValid()` / `IsNonLargeValid()` - 对象有效性验证\\n- `SizeOf()` - 对象大小\\n- `GetLockWord()` / `GetLockOwnerThreadId()` - 锁信息\\n\\n**关键设计决策：**\\n- **HeapReference 压缩机制**：所有对象引用都是 32 位，即使在 64 位平台\\n- `DEFINE_QUICK_CACHE` 宏实现 `klass` 字段的快速缓存\\n- `klass()` 直接读取内存（不解压缩），`GetClass()` 通过 MemoryRef 自动解压缩\\n\\n**领域知识：**\\n- Object 对象头（8 字节）：`+0x00: klass_`（32位压缩引用）、`+0x04: monitor_`\\n- 所有对象 8 字节对齐\\n- String 对象（SDK 26+）：`count_` 低1位=压缩标志（Latin-1/UTF-16），高31位=长度\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 7. `/android/art/runtime/runtime.cpp` - Runtime 实现\\n\\n**类/函数/算法：**\\n- `Runtime::Init()` - 注册 SDK 监听器（Init23 到 Init37，共 12 个版本）\\n- `Runtime::Init23()...Init37()` - **版本偏移量表初始化**：每个版本 64-bit 和 32-bit 不同的偏移量（callee_save_methods、resolution_method、imt_conflict/unimplemented_method、heap、monitor_pool、thread_list、class_linker、java_vm、jit）\\n- `Runtime::Current()` - **Runtime 单例获取**：通过 `Android::DlSym(ART_RUNTIME_INSTANCE)` 获取实例指针，缓存到 `runtime_instance_ori_cache`\\n- `Runtime::AnalysisCalleeSaveMethods()` - 通过 ImageHeader magic 匹配 boot.art 的 callee_saves 方法\\n- `Runtime::AnalysisRuntime()` - 在 LoadBlock 中搜索匹配 callee_methods 的 runtime 实例\\n- `Runtime::AnalysisInstance()` - 分析实例入口（调用 AnalysisCalleeSaveMethods + AnalysisRuntime）\\n- `GetHeap()` / `GetMonitorPool()` / `GetThreadList()` / `GetClassLinker()` / `GetJavaVM()` / `GetJit()` - 子系统访问器（带缓存）\\n- `GetResolutionMethod()` / `GetImtConflictMethod()` / `GetImtUnimplementedMethod()` - ART 特殊方法获取\\n- `GetCalleeSaveMethod(type)` - 获取 CalleeSaveType 对应的 ArtMethod\\n\\n**关键设计决策：**\\n- **双层缓存机制**：每个子系统（heap、thread_list 等）有独立 MemoryRef 缓存，首次访问时懒加载\\n- **ART_RUNTIME_PARSER 模式**：验证 runtime 实例的 callee_save_methods 与 image 匹配，不匹配则 `AnalysisRuntime` 重新搜索\\n- **MAIN_PROP_PARSER 模式**（SDK >= V）：扫描 heap 指针附近 finalizer_timeout_ms_ 字段，精确定位堆偏移\\n- **kNumCalleeMethodsCount 变化**：SDK 26（O）之前为 3，SDK 26+ 为 4，SDK 28（P）+ 为 6\\n\\n**领域知识：**\\n- Runtime 是 ART 核心单例，包含堆、线程列表、类链接器、JIT 等子系统\\n- CalleeSaveMethod：保存现场的方法，用于栈回溯\\n- IMT（Interface Method Table）：接口方法的冲突/未实现处理\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 8. `/core/api/core.cpp` - ELF Core 解析\\n\\n**类/函数/算法：**\\n- `CoreApi::Init()` - 初始化 Elf、LinkMap\\n- `CoreApi::Load(corefile, remote, callback)` - **主加载入口**：根据 machine 类型（EM_AARCH64/EM_RISCV/EM_X86_64/EM_ARM/EM_386）创建对应的 Core 实例\\n- `CoreApi::NewLoadBlock(vaddr, size, flags)` - 分配新的 LoadBlock（fake vaddr 分配算法）\\n- `CoreApi::addLoadBlock() / removeAllLoadBlock()` - LoadBlock 管理\\n- `CoreApi::GetReal(vaddr, opt)` / `GetVirtual(raddr)` - 虚拟地址/物理地址转换\\n- `CoreApi::IsVirtualValid(vaddr)` - 虚拟地址有效性检查\\n- `CoreApi::FindAuxv(type)` - 查找 AT_PHDR/AT_ENTRY 等辅助向量\\n- `CoreApi::FindThread(tid)` / `ForeachThread()` - 线程查找/遍历\\n- `CoreApi::FindFile(vaddr)` / `ForeachFile()` - 文件查找/遍历\\n- `CoreApi::FindLinkMap(path)` - 符号链接映射查找（支持 `!` 分割的 sub-file）\\n- `CoreApi::DlSym(symbol)` - 动态符号解析（在所有 LinkMap 中搜索）\\n- `CoreApi::SysRoot(path)` - 符号路径重映射\\n- `CoreApi::Read(vaddr, size, buf)` / `Write(vaddr, buf, size)` - 内存读写\\n- `CoreApi::ForeachLoadBlock(callback, check, quick)` - LoadBlock 遍历\\n\\n**关键设计决策：**\\n- **Platform-specific Core**：通过 EM_* machine type 选择 arm64/x86_64/riscv64/arm/x86 实现\\n- **Fake Block 分配算法**：按需分配 fake vaddr，支持重叠检测和连续分配\\n- **Quick LoadBlock**：根据 flags 决定是否加入 mQuickLoad（快速查找路径）\\n- **LinkMap 懒加载**：ForeachLinkMap 时首次调用 loadLinkMap()\\n\\n**领域知识：**\\n- ELF Core 文件类型：ET_CORE (4)\\n- ELF Page Size：4KB (0x1000)\\n- VMA 过滤器标志：FLAG_R/FLAG_W/FLAG_X 等\\n- LoadBlock：映射文件段（PHDR），支持 vaddr虚拟地址 到 raddr物理地址 的转换\\n- Block 类型：mMap（内存映射）、mFile（文件映射）、mFake（fake 分配）\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 知识图谱节点统计\\n\\n| 文件 | 类型 | 关键节点 |\\n|------|------|---------|\\n| core_parser.cpp | file | main, command_preload, QuitCommand |\\n| command_manager.cpp | file | CommandManager, Execute, FindCommand, PluginCommand |\\n| cmd_class.cpp | file | ClassCommand, PrintPrettyClassContent, ForeachStaticField |\\n| cmd_space.cpp | file | SpaceCommand, JavaVerify, ForeachObjects |\\n| android.cpp | file | Android, ForeachInstanceField, ForeachArtMethods, SysRoot |\\n| object.h | file | Object, Class, DEFINE_QUICK_CACHE |\\n| runtime.cpp | file | Runtime, Current, AnalysisRuntime, GetHeap |\\n| core.cpp | file | CoreApi, Load, v2r, r2v, DlSym |\\n\\n## 设计模式总结\\n\\n1. **单例模式**：`CommandManager`、`Android`、`CoreApi`、`Runtime` 均使用单例\\n2. **版本适配模式**：SDK 版本检测 + 条件分支（SDK 24/26/28/36 分界线）\\n3. **缓存模式**：QuickCache 宏 + 子系统懒加载缓存\\n4. **监听器模式**：SdkListener/OatListener 版本变化回调\\n5. **策略模式**：不同 machine type 选择不同 Core message.content:
You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>/init-explore</user_request>
  <requested_at>2026-06-07</requested_at>
</observed_from_primary_session>

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on durable technical signal:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)
- Concrete debugging or investigative findings from logs, traces, queue state, database rows, and code-path inspection

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored, discovered, confirmed, traced

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built or learned):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"
- "Observation queue for claude-mem session timed out waiting for an agent pool slot"
- "Fallback processing abandoned pending messages after Gemini and OpenRouter returned 404"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings with no follow-on finding
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- File related research that comes back empty or not found

If skipping, return an empty response only. Do not explain the skip in prose.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision | security_alert | security_note ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

MEMORY PROCESSING START
=======================

attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

/home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit/parser/core_parser.cpp - 主入口点\\n2. /home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit/parser/command/command_manager.cpp - 命令管理器\\n3. 进行分析，每个文件都需要深度分析并提供详细报告。\",\"agentId\":\"ae5fedec627e930d1\",\"agentType\":\"general-purpose\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"\\n\\n## 8 核心文件深度分析报告\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 1. `/parser/core_parser.cpp` - 主入口点\\n\\n**类/函数/算法：**\\n- `show_copyright()` - 打印版权信息\\n- `show_compat_android_version()` - 打印 SDK 兼容性表格（21-37）\\n- `show_parser_usage()` - 打印命令行帮助\\n- `QuitCommand` 类 - 内置退出命令（继承 Command）\\n- `command_preload(int argc, char* const argv[])` - 核心预处理函数，解析 --core/-c, --pid/-p, --tomb/-t, --sdk, --sysroot, --va_bits, --page_size, --http, --mcp 等选项\\n- `main(int argc, char* const argv[])` - 主入口，设置信号处理、初始化 CommandManager、检测 --mcp 模式、启动 UI 线程或 MCP 服务器\\n\\n**关键设计决策：**\\n- `--mcp` 模式在预处理阶段提前检测，stdout 重定向到 /dev/null 避免干扰 JSON-RPC 通信\\n- `command_preload` 返回 -1 表示不加载 corefile（如 --help、--http 模式）\\n- 支持三种加载模式：corefile 文件、进程 PID 远程 attach、tombstone 文件转换\\n\\n**领域知识：**\\n- core-parser 支持 coredump 分析（`-c`）、进程 attach（`-p`，Linux only）、tombstone 转换（`-t`）\\n- VMA 过滤器标志：FILTER_SPECIAL_VMA（0x19 默认）、FILTER_SANITIZER_SHADOW_VMA、FILTER_NON_READ_VMA\\n- MCP（Model Context Protocol）模式用于 AI 助手集成，通过 stdio 通信\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 2. `/parser/command/command_manager.cpp` - 命令管理器\\n\\n**类/函数/算法：**\\n- `CommandManager` 类 - 单例模式管理所有命令\\n- `VersionCommand` 类 - 返回版本信息（支持 `--git` 参数显示 git commit）\\n- `CommandManager::Init()` - 静态初始化，注册 50+ 内置命令（core 类、android 类、llvm 类、other 类）\\n- `CommandManager::Execute(const char* cmd, int argc, char* const argv[])` - 命令执行入口，支持管道（`|`）和重定向（`>`）\\n- `CommandManager::FindCommand(const char* cmd)` - 通过命令名或快捷键查找命令\\n- `CommandManager::ForeachCommand()` / `foreachInlineCommand()` / `foreachExtendCommand()` - 遍历命令\\n- `PushInlineCommand(Command*)` / `PushExtendCommand(Command*)` / `PopExtendCommand(Command*)` - 命令注册管理\\n- 插件系统：`plugin->GetCurrent()` 获取当前插件，`HookCommand` 挂载命令\\n\\n**关键设计决策：**\\n- 内置命令通过 `PushInlineCommand` 注册，插件命令通过 `PushExtendCommand` 注册（可覆盖）\\n- 管道处理：`shell` 命令回调机制实现 `command | shell_cmd`\\n- 重定向：临时关闭高亮模式 (`Logger::SetHighLight`) 写入文件\\n\\n**领域知识：**\\n- 命令分为 inline（内置）和 extend（插件扩展）两类\\n- 插件系统允许动态注册/注销命令，`FakeCommand` 处理 fake core 模式\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 3. `/parser/command/android/cmd_class.cpp` - class 命令实现\\n\\n**类/函数/算法：**\\n- `ClassCommand::prepare(int argc, char* const argv[])` - 参数解析，支持 `-m`(method)、`-s`(static)、`-i`(impl)、`-f`(field)、`-x`(hex)，以及 `--app/--zygote/--image/--fake` 过滤\\n- `ClassCommand::main(int argc, char* const argv[])` - 主逻辑：单个对象直接打印；类名搜索则 `Android::ForeachObjects` 遍历堆\\n- `ClassCommand::PrintClass()` - 遍历回调，打印类名（descriptor 格式）\\n- `ClassCommand::PrintPrettyClassContent()` - 打印完整类信息：继承关系、实现接口、静态字段、实例字段（按 superclass 链遍历）、方法\\n- `PrintField(format, current, clazz, field, print_options)` - 字段打印（复用 PrintCommand）\\n\\n**关键设计决策：**\\n- 实例字段按 `super -> current` 链遍历（do-while），正确继承顺序\\n- 静态字段通过 `Android::ForeachStaticField` 遍历\\n- 方法通过 `Android::ForeachArtMethods` 遍历\\n- `try-catch(InvalidAddressException)` 保护堆遍历\\n\\n**领域知识：**\\n- 类名使用 ART descriptor 格式：`Ljava/lang/String;`\\n- `shadow$_klass_` / `shadow$_monitor_` 是 Kotlin 协程引入的隐藏字段\\n- `--check` 模式检测损坏对象（通过 JavaVerify）\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 4. `/parser/command/android/cmd_space.cpp` - space 命令实现\\n\\n**类/函数/算法：**\\n- `SpaceCommand::prepare()` - 参数解析：`--check`、`--full-check`、 `--app/--zygote/--image/--fake`\\n- `SpaceCommand::main()` - 两种模式：\\n  - **check 模式**：调用 `JavaVerify` 验证对象，`verify.verify(object)` + `verify.verifyMethods()`\\n  - **list 模式**：遍历 `heap.GetContinuousSpaces()` 和 `heap.GetDiscontinuousSpaces()`，打印每种 space 的类型、地址范围、指针、名称\\n\\n**关键设计决策：**\\n- check 模式使用 `JavaVerify::CHECK_FULL_BAD_OBJECT | CHECK_FULL_CONFLICT_METHOD | CHECK_FULL_REUSE_DEX_PC_PTR | CHECK_FULL_U_EXTENDS_RECORD` 标志\\n- 大对象空间（LargeObjectSpace）单独处理，有 `Begin()/End()` 地址范围\\n- 遍历标志默认全开：`EACH_APP_OBJECTS | EACH_ZYGOTE_OBJECTS | EACH_IMAGE_OBJECTS | EACH_FAKE_OBJECTS`\\n\\n**领域知识：**\\n- Space 类型：kSpaceTypeImageSpace(0)、kSpaceTypeZygoteSpace(1)、kSpaceTypeRegionSpace(5)、kSpaceTypeMallocSpace(6)、kSpaceTypeLargeObjectSpace(7)\\n- ContinuousSpaces：ImageSpace、ZygoteSpace、RegionSpace、MallocSpace\\n- DiscontinuousSpaces：LargeObjectSpace、HeapInlineAllocatorSpace\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 5. `/android/android.cpp` - Android 版本检测与运行时镜像\\n\\n**类/函数/算法：**\\n- `Android::Init()` / `Android::init()` - 单例初始化，从 system property 读取 ro.build.version.sdk/trunk/release/id 等\\n- `Android::Sdk2Trunk(int sdk)` - SDK 版本到 Trunk 版本映射（kTrunkData 数组）\\n- `Android::preLoad()` - 初始化所有 ART 镜像类型（Object、Class、String、Array、DexCache 等）\\n- `Android::preLoadLater()` - 动态库路径选择：`realLibart` 根据 SDK >= Q / > P / else 选择 LIBART64/LIBART32 或 LV29/LV28 变体\\n- `Android::RegisterSdkListener(int minisdk, fn)` / `RegisterOatListener(int minioat, fn)` - 版本监听器模式\\n- `Android::ForeachInstanceField/StaticField()` - **SDK 版本适配核心**：SDK >= W 使用统一 fields 数组（`GetFields()`），SDK < W 使用分离存储（`GetIFields()`/`GetSFields()`）\\n- `Android::ForeachArtMethods()` - **SDK >= N** 使用统一 methods 数组，SDK < N 分离 direct/virtual\\n- `Android::ForeachObjects(fn, flag, check)` - 堆遍历主函数，按 space 类型过滤（Image/Zygote/App/Fake）\\n- `Android::SysRoot(path)` - 符号路径解析，将本地文件映射到 coredump 内存（处理 DEX、VDEX、ZIP）\\n- `Android::Prepare()` - 运行时预热，触发 heap space 加载\\n\\n**关键设计决策：**\\n- **版本适配模式（强制）**：所有字段/方法遍历必须检查 SDK 版本\\n- **监听器模式**：SDK/OAT 版本变化时自动执行回调，刷新偏移量表\\n- **SysRoot 双路径**：`dir:dir` 格式支持多目录搜索，`!` 分割主从文件（multidex）\\n- **QuickCache 优化**：`DEFINE_QUICK_CACHE` 避免重复地址解析\\n\\n**领域知识：**\\n- Trunk 版本：M=13, N=14, O=15, P=16, Q=17, R=18, S=19, T=20, U=21, V=22, W=23, X=24\\n- 每个 ART 对象都是 8 字节对齐（kObjectAlignment）\\n- HeapReference 始终 32 位压缩引用\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 6. `/android/art/runtime/mirror/object.h` - ART 对象模型头文件\\n\\n**类/结构体：**\\n- `Object_OffsetTable` - 对象内存布局偏移量表（klass_、monitor_）\\n- `Object_SizeTable` - 对象大小表（THIS = 8）\\n- `Object` 类 - 继承自 `api::MemoryRef`，所有 ART 对象的基类\\n\\n**关键方法：**\\n- `GetClass()` - 获取 Class 对象（自动解压缩 32 位引用）\\n- `IsClass()` / `IsString()` / `IsArrayInstance()` / `IsReferenceInstance()` - 类型判断\\n- `IsValid()` / `IsNonLargeValid()` - 对象有效性验证\\n- `SizeOf()` - 对象大小\\n- `GetLockWord()` / `GetLockOwnerThreadId()` - 锁信息\\n\\n**关键设计决策：**\\n- **HeapReference 压缩机制**：所有对象引用都是 32 位，即使在 64 位平台\\n- `DEFINE_QUICK_CACHE` 宏实现 `klass` 字段的快速缓存\\n- `klass()` 直接读取内存（不解压缩），`GetClass()` 通过 MemoryRef 自动解压缩\\n\\n**领域知识：**\\n- Object 对象头（8 字节）：`+0x00: klass_`（32位压缩引用）、`+0x04: monitor_`\\n- 所有对象 8 字节对齐\\n- String 对象（SDK 26+）：`count_` 低1位=压缩标志（Latin-1/UTF-16），高31位=长度\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 7. `/android/art/runtime/runtime.cpp` - Runtime 实现\\n\\n**类/函数/算法：**\\n- `Runtime::Init()` - 注册 SDK 监听器（Init23 到 Init37，共 12 个版本）\\n- `Runtime::Init23()...Init37()` - **版本偏移量表初始化**：每个版本 64-bit 和 32-bit 不同的偏移量（callee_save_methods、resolution_method、imt_conflict/unimplemented_method、heap、monitor_pool、thread_list、class_linker、java_vm、jit）\\n- `Runtime::Current()` - **Runtime 单例获取**：通过 `Android::DlSym(ART_RUNTIME_INSTANCE)` 获取实例指针，缓存到 `runtime_instance_ori_cache`\\n- `Runtime::AnalysisCalleeSaveMethods()` - 通过 ImageHeader magic 匹配 boot.art 的 callee_saves 方法\\n- `Runtime::AnalysisRuntime()` - 在 LoadBlock 中搜索匹配 callee_methods 的 runtime 实例\\n- `Runtime::AnalysisInstance()` - 分析实例入口（调用 AnalysisCalleeSaveMethods + AnalysisRuntime）\\n- `GetHeap()` / `GetMonitorPool()` / `GetThreadList()` / `GetClassLinker()` / `GetJavaVM()` / `GetJit()` - 子系统访问器（带缓存）\\n- `GetResolutionMethod()` / `GetImtConflictMethod()` / `GetImtUnimplementedMethod()` - ART 特殊方法获取\\n- `GetCalleeSaveMethod(type)` - 获取 CalleeSaveType 对应的 ArtMethod\\n\\n**关键设计决策：**\\n- **双层缓存机制**：每个子系统（heap、thread_list 等）有独立 MemoryRef 缓存，首次访问时懒加载\\n- **ART_RUNTIME_PARSER 模式**：验证 runtime 实例的 callee_save_methods 与 image 匹配，不匹配则 `AnalysisRuntime` 重新搜索\\n- **MAIN_PROP_PARSER 模式**（SDK >= V）：扫描 heap 指针附近 finalizer_timeout_ms_ 字段，精确定位堆偏移\\n- **kNumCalleeMethodsCount 变化**：SDK 26（O）之前为 3，SDK 26+ 为 4，SDK 28（P）+ 为 6\\n\\n**领域知识：**\\n- Runtime 是 ART 核心单例，包含堆、线程列表、类链接器、JIT 等子系统\\n- CalleeSaveMethod：保存现场的方法，用于栈回溯\\n- IMT（Interface Method Table）：接口方法的冲突/未实现处理\\n\\n---\\n\\n### 8. `/core/api/core.cpp` - ELF Core 解析\\n\\n**类/函数/算法：**\\n- `CoreApi::Init()` - 初始化 Elf、LinkMap\\n- `CoreApi::Load(corefile, remote, callback)` - **主加载入口**：根据 machine 类型（EM_AARCH64/EM_RISCV/EM_X86_64/EM_ARM/EM_386）创建对应的 Core 实例\\n- `CoreApi::NewLoadBlock(vaddr, size, flags)` - 分配新的 LoadBlock（fake vaddr 分配算法）\\n- `CoreApi::addLoadBlock() / removeAllLoadBlock()` - LoadBlock 管理\\n- `CoreApi::GetReal(vaddr, opt)` / `GetVirtual(raddr)` - 虚拟地址/物理地址转换\\n- `CoreApi::IsVirtualValid(vaddr)` - 虚拟地址有效性检查\\n- `CoreApi::FindAuxv(type)` - 查找 AT_PHDR/AT_ENTRY 等辅助向量\\n- `CoreApi::FindThread(tid)` / `ForeachThread()` - 线程查找/遍历\\n- `CoreApi::FindFile(vaddr)` / `ForeachFile()` - 文件查找/遍历\\n- `CoreApi::FindLinkMap(path)` - 符号链接映射查找（支持 `!` 分割的 sub-file）\\n- `CoreApi::DlSym(symbol)` - 动态符号解析（在所有 LinkMap 中搜索）\\n- `CoreApi::SysRoot(path)` - 符号路径重映射\\n- `CoreApi::Read(vaddr, size, buf)` / `Write(vaddr, buf, size)` - 内存读写\\n- `CoreApi::ForeachLoadBlock(callback, check, quick)` - LoadBlock 遍历\\n\\n**关键设计决策：**\\n- **Platform-specific Core**：通过 EM_* machine type 选择 arm64/x86_64/riscv64/arm/x86 实现\\n- **Fake Block 分配算法**：按需分配 fake vaddr，支持重叠检测和连续分配\\n- **Quick LoadBlock**：根据 flags 决定是否加入 mQuickLoad（快速查找路径）\\n- **LinkMap 懒加载**：ForeachLinkMap 时首次调用 loadLinkMap()\\n\\n**领域知识：**\\n- ELF Core 文件类型：ET_CORE (4)\\n- ELF Page Size：4KB (0x1000)\\n- VMA 过滤器标志：FLAG_R/FLAG_W/FLAG_X 等\\n- LoadBlock：映射文件段（PHDR），支持 vaddr虚拟地址 到 raddr物理地址 的转换\\n- Block 类型：mMap（内存映射）、mFile（文件映射）、mFake（fake 分配）\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 知识图谱节点统计\\n\\n| 文件 | 类型 | 关键节点 |\\n|------|------|---------|\\n| core_parser.cpp | file | main, command_preload, QuitCommand |\\n| command_manager.cpp | file | CommandManager, Execute, FindCommand, PluginCommand |\\n| cmd_class.cpp | file | ClassCommand, PrintPrettyClassContent, ForeachStaticField |\\n| cmd_space.cpp | file | SpaceCommand, JavaVerify, ForeachObjects |\\n| android.cpp | file | Android, ForeachInstanceField, ForeachArtMethods, SysRoot |\\n| object.h | file | Object, Class, DEFINE_QUICK_CACHE |\\n| runtime.cpp | file | Runtime, Current, AnalysisRuntime, GetHeap |\\n| core.cpp | file | CoreApi, Load, v2r, r2v, DlSym |\\n\\n## 设计模式总结\\n\\n1. **单例模式**：`CommandManager`、`Android`、`CoreApi`、`Runtime` 均使用单例\\n2. **版本适配模式**：SDK 版本检测 + 条件分支（SDK 24/26/28/36 分界线）\\n3. **缓存模式**：QuickCache 宏 + 子系统懒加载缓存\\n4. **监听器模式**：SdkListener/OatListener 版本变化回调\\n5. **策略模式**：不同 machine type 选择不同 Core 实现\"}],\"totalDurationMs\":128950,\"totalTokens\":143302,\"totalToolUseCount\":19,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":32,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":0,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":139680,\"output_tokens\":3590,\"server_tool_use\":{\"web_search_requests\":0,\"web_fetch_requests\":0},\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":0},\"inference_geo\":\"\",\"iterations\":[],\"speed\":\"standard\"},\"toolStats\":{\"readCount\":10,\"searchCount\":0,\"bashCount\":4,\"editFileCount\":0,\"linesAdded\":0,\"linesRemoved\":0,\"otherToolCount\":5}}"</outcome>
